As we know that sum of two digits is 10, we can write:

x + y = 10 ————— (1)

Number can be written as 10 * x + y and number obtained after reversing will be 10 * y + x.

According to the question,

(10 * y + x) - (10 * x + y) = 54
10*y + x - 10*x - y = 54
9*y - 9*x = 54
